title: DIMCP EP_38 SushiReview
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_38 SushiReview.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Welcome back to the show.
[00:00:02.00] Ralph Dog is my co-pilot.
[00:00:04.00] Sitting here waiting for my dog to get back from...
[00:00:12.00] I think he went up into a condo apartment to deliver some sushi
[00:00:20.00] which is actually my favorite food.
[00:00:24.00] If we're talking about favorite foods and we're talking about sushi
[00:00:32.00] then su plus su equals four.
[00:00:36.00] You know what I'm saying?
[00:00:40.00] I think sushi is best
[00:00:44.00] eating with the hands
[00:00:48.00] with wasabi and ginger
[00:00:52.00] and soy sauce just a little bit.
[00:00:56.00] Mostly just put a whole fucking...
